title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: L&T Finance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Pimpri-Chinchwad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
